summary: Configurações module testing completed. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in user creation. All 17 backend tests pass. All frontend flows tested and working: User CRUD, Company Data editing, Logo management, and RBAC access control.

fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not excluded from response causing 500 error
fixed.fix: Added _id exclusion before returning response in configuracoes.py line 94-95

warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning)

critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB _id exclusion was missing in POST /api/configuracoes/usuarios - FIXED
Dialog components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - minor issue
seed_data_creation: Test users created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Configurações module fully tested. All 3 tabs working: Usuários (CRUD), Dados da Empresa (view/edit), Logo (upload/remove). RBAC working - only admin can access. MongoDB ObjectId bug was fixed in configuracoes.py.

frontend_tests.navigation_to_configuracoes: PASS - Configurações page loads with 3 tabs
frontend_tests.usuarios_tab_list: PASS - Users list displayed with roles and status
frontend_tests.usuarios_create: PASS - New user creation with vendedor role works
frontend_tests.usuarios_edit: PASS - User editing works with success toast
frontend_tests.usuarios_delete: PASS - User deletion works with confirmation
frontend_tests.admin_self_delete_prevention: PASS - No delete button for admin user
frontend_tests.empresa_tab_edit: PASS - Edit form works with save functionality
frontend_tests.logo_tab: PASS - Logo section with upload/remove options
frontend_tests.sidebar_logo: PASS - Default logo displayed in sidebar
frontend_tests.rbac_vendedor_access: PASS - Vendedor denied access with 'Acesso Restrito' message
